hero.title: Facilities
hero.subtitle: Purpose-built spaces designed for small-group learning, hands-on discovery, and community gathering.

items.name: Computer Lab
items.description: Modern computing facilities for digital literacy and ICT lessons. Students build confidence with technology from an early age.

items.name: Science Lab
items.description: Hands-on experiments and inquiry-based learning in an equipped lab. Students learn by doing — not just watching.

items.name: Discussion Room
items.description: Small-group spaces for collaborative learning and peer discussion. Where ideas are shared and confidence is built.

items.name: Hall
items.description: Multi-purpose space for assemblies, performances, and gatherings. Concerts, celebrations, and community events happen here.

items.name: Library
items.description: Reading resources and quiet study space for all students. A place to explore, imagine, and discover independently.

items.name: Main Lobby
items.description: Welcoming entrance and reception area for parents and visitors. First impressions matter — ours is warm and intentional.

items.name: Classroom
items.description: Bright, air-conditioned spaces designed for small-group learning. Every child sits close enough to ask a question.

items.name: Surau
items.description: Prayer space supporting spiritual development and religious observance. Respect and inclusion woven into daily life.

items.name: Outdoor Space
items.description: Open-air area for physical activity, play, and outdoor learning. Fresh air and movement between lessons.
